title: LegacyAI Patchset Record
description: Metadata record for an ordered series of patches targeting a specific baseline artifact.

id.description: Patchset identifier in the form namespace:name, e.g. y2038:fix-time_t-overflow.

namespace.description: Namespace the patchset belongs to, e.g. y2038.

name.description: Short name of the patchset within the namespace.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the patchset does.

order.description: 1-based sequence position of this patch in the series.

patch_id.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the referenced patch file.

note.description: Optional human-readable note about this patch's role.

baseline_artifact_id.description: ID of the artifact (source archive) that this patchset targets.

expected_source_hash.description: Expected SHA-256 of the source archive at the baseline.

output_artifact_id.description: Optional ID of the derived artifact produced after applying this patchset.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the patchset was created.
